sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (time DateTime, number UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY time;
INSERT INTO events (time, number) VALUES (now(), 1), (now() + interval 1 second, 2), (now() + interval 2 seconds, 3);
UPDATE events SET number = 4 WHERE number = 2;
SELECT sequenceCount('(?1).*(?2)')(time, number = 1, number = 2) FROM events;
